No activity yet — start your first quest!
Complete these real-world challenges to build your resilience. Each quest maps directly to something you can do today.
Scenarios let you get ready for specific, realistic situations — step by step, before they ever happen. Pick one to walk through, or create your own for your region.

🏠 YOUR HOUSEHOLD
⚙ HOUSEHOLD SETTINGS
Tell Thrive a little about your household and scenarios will adapt their advice to your situation. Tick whatever applies — everything is optional, nothing is judged, and it all stays on this device.
